rooms.name: {cW* {cwThe Hidden Snowflake {cW*{c0
rooms.description:
Before you stands a large archway of white stone, decorated by intricate vines
of {cGivy{cg and {cWjasmine{cg.  Joining the delicate natural weavings of
plant-life, are a number of bright colored twinkling lights, blinking on and
off.  {cRRed{cg, {cBblue{cg, {cGgreen{cg, {cYyellow{cg and {cMpink{cg.  They all
sparkle brilliantly and randomly along the archway like tiny fairies.  Hung from
the center of the top of the archway is a vibrant piece of {cGmistletoe{cg with
{cRholly{cg bells.  Could this place look any more like a typical
Christmas-influenced venue?
rooms.smell: The soft scent of jasmine fills your nostrils.
rooms.listen: Soft volumes of Christmas carols can be heard from inside..

exits.description: The pathway leads you inside The Hidden Snowflake.

Frost covered bushes, trees and flowers line the cobblestone pathway to the
East.

{cWFrost{c0 covered bushes, trees and flowers envelope the pathway's end to the
South.

Directly above you, hangs a gentle piece of {cGmistletoe{c0.  Is there anyone
around you want to make use of this moment with?..

Beneath you lays a smooth cobblestone pathway, leading into The Hidden
Snowflake.

rooms.name: {cW* {cwThe Hidden Snowflake {cW*{c0
rooms.description:
You're now in, what seems to be, an entrance hallway.  However, you notice one
thing is missing.  There is no ceiling.  Instead, pillars line your path
onwards, entryways leading into separate rooms that are divided off by neatly
crafted wooden {cWwhite{cg lattice-work panels.  {cGIvy{cg vines and
{cwjasmine{cg continue to twine around the pillars and over and through the
lattice panels in the area, providing a very calming and peaceful view.  This
place feels like a sanctuary, pretty and quiet.  {c0
rooms.smell: The soothing scent of jasmine wafts through the area.
rooms.listen: Soft sounds of christmas carols and chimes ring gentle through the area.

exits.description:
Heading North along the cobblestone pathway will lead you into the central
courtyard of The Hidden Snowflake.

Clean white lattice sides your way to the east, vines and jasmine twisting and
turning in and out the holes of the fencing.  Pretty.
Leaving south will bring you to the front entrance of The Hidden Snowflake.

Clean white lattice sides your way to the west, vines and jasmine twisting and
turning in and out the holes of the fencing.  Pretty.

Looking upwards through the ceiling-less hallway, you're able to view the sky
above with perfect clarity.
The smooth cobblestone pathway continues beneath you, clean and sturdy.

rooms.name: {cW* {cwThe Hidden Snowflake {cW*{c0
rooms.description:
A beautiful crystal fountain stands before you in the center of this large main
courtyard.  Potplans of all shapes, colors and sizes decorate the area, vines
crawling and twisting around the surrounding pillars and lattice frames.  Birds
tweet gently in the distance, water from the fountain splashes down soothingly.
A couple of white benches have been placed around the area for visitors to sit
and relax, wasting away the hours, staring up at the sky and into nothingness.
Everything is so clean, so full of nature.  White lattice, the cobblestone
pathway, the glistening crystal fountain...  All so beautiful.

exits.description: The Naughty corner is this way, full of screaming annoying bad children!

Eastwards through the lattice archway is the Bar room, where you can purchase
some refreshments.
West through the lattice archway is the Function Room.

rooms.name: {cW*{cw The Hidden Snowflake - Bar {cW*{c0
rooms.description:
Coming through the lattice archway from the west, you now find yourself in what
appears to be a bar room.  A short little elf whistles away to himself as he
polishes down a white marble bar, glasses and mugs hanging up behind him,
sparkling clean.  Potted plants again adorn the area, set in the corners of the
room, they sprout out green leaves and flowers of all colors, adding vibrance to
the atmosphere. Above you is a lattice-work ceiling, allowing light from the sun
or moon to filter down into the area through the twisting jasmine vines.

rooms.name: {cW* {cwThe Hidden Snowflake - Function Room {cW*{c0
rooms.description:
Small Christmas lights twinkle and blink around the room, decorating the
lattice-work walls around you.  There is no real ceiling above you, just more
white lattice with jasmine vines twisting and turning in and out of the holes in
the wooden design.  Small wall speakers have been hung in different places in
here from the lattice, playing Christmas carols and tunes in a soft volume,
spreading the Christmas cheer and spirit for all to hear.  A large stage has
been set up toward the end of the room at the west, following a number of
{cWwhite{cg wooden seats, all of which are decorated with {cRred{cg and {cGgreen{cg tinsel.
rooms.smell: There is the scent of Christmas cheer and eggnog hanging in the air.
rooms.listen:
You hear Christmas carols being whispered through the wall speakers hung
throughout the room.

rooms.name: {cW* {crThe Naughty Corner {cW*{c0
rooms.description:
This is where all the bad girls and boys are sent when they have been bad,
especially at Christmas time.  They're all sulking, moaning, and complaining, so
loud and so constantly that it's almost deafening!  This room is bare of any
decoration, and is the only room that is made not from lattice, but instead of
straight wood.  No jasmine, no plants, no flashy lights, nothing.

exits.description: Southwards will take you back to the main courtyard of The Hidden Snowflake.
